Parameter: Nutrient (Mineral) Deficiencies and Their Associated Syndrome
Napier Grass: N: Pale green leaves, slow regrowth; P: Stunted clumps; K: Yellowing of leaf tips
Hedge Lucerne: N: General chlorosis (if nodules fail); P: Stunted growth, dark foliage; Ca: Growing point death
Stylosanthes: P: Purple-red stems/leaves; N: Pale leaves; S: Yellowing of young leaves
